data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Temporary equipment loan during repair', which is mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms this requirement has been satisfied, such as API reads or state checks indicating that a loaner mini-fridge was offered or utilized during the repair process. The absence of this evidence constitutes a gap in the requirement coverage, as the expected result was not met.
gaps: No evidence confirming that a temporary equipment loan was provided during the repair.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence of loaner equipment provision
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that a loaner mini-fridge was offered and its status during the repair.
